mentions.note: Down; packaged food weakness signals inflation fears overriding growth story.
Food company with challenges; high yield no substitute for deteriorating fundamentals; Cramer avoids dividend traps on weak business momentum.

CPG with 8%+ yield (among highest in group); RFK Jr. opposition to junk food and GLP-1 drugs pose headwinds; Cramer argues stasis unworkable, yield could rise to 9% if no action taken; breakup needed.
